Name: Kaputt
Summary: Kaputt is a large-scale visual defect detection dataset with 238,421 images, 48,376 unique items, and 29,316 defective instances from retail logistics inspection scenarios.
Task: Anomaly Detection; Defect Detection; Defect Segmentation
Size: 238421 images, including 29316 defective instances and 48376 unique items
Description:
Kaputt is a large-scale dataset for visual defect detection in retail logistics. It is designed for anomaly and defect detection in realistic inspection scenes where objects vary strongly in pose, appearance, placement, and defect type.

The dataset contains 238,421 images of 48,376 unique items, including 29,316 defective instances. It supports visual defect detection and segmentation research, especially for methods that need broader visual diversity than small industrial anomaly benchmarks.

Kaputt is distributed through an official dataset website and is associated with an ICCV 2025 paper.
